typical_current_notes: USB port limit ~500mA total; onboard 5V pin not for powering motors/servos
Use base resistor ~1k; requires flyback diode across motor
Sensitive to 5V signals; requires level shifting if host is 5V
Prefer divider/resistor on HC-05 RX if driving from 5V
Needs pullup or pulldown to avoid floating input
Place near sensor VCC/GND for decoupling (reduce noise)
